name: instagram-dmresponder-agent
description: Instagram Lead Engine - DM Responder Agent: Context-aware conversation management and follow-up generation

conversation_history.description: Array of conversation messages with roles (user/assistant)

lead_context.description: Lead information from prospector (optional, enhances responses)

warnings: This agent generates SUGGESTIONS for human review
NEVER send messages without human approval
Always review and personalize AI-generated responses
Ensure compliance with Instagram messaging policies
Only use AFTER prospect has replied to your manual first message
